channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: NCRPO Maintains Full Alert During VP Sara Duterte's Impeachment Trial
item.description: The National Capital Region Police Office (NCRPO) has declared a state of full alert in Metro Manila as the impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte commenced on July 6, 2026. Over 4,000 polic...

item.title: New Rural Employment Scheme Focuses on Water Security and Disaster Mitigation
item.description: The new rural employment scheme VB-G RAM G, launched from July 1, emphasizes strengthening water security in villages by allocating 107 of 318 permissible works to address rain deficiency issues. This...

item.title: Jordan Henderson's Wrist Injury Raises Doubts Over World Cup Participation
item.description: England midfielder Jordan Henderson is likely to undergo surgery for a wrist injury sustained during a celebratory fall after his team's World Cup victory over Mexico. The 36-year-old player fell awkw...

item.title: Trump's Hypocrisy on Birthright Citizenship Exposed Through Balogun's Case
item.description: The article discusses the irony of US President Donald Trump's stance on birthright citizenship through the case of Folarin Balogun, a US World Cup striker. Balogun, who became an American citizen due...

item.title: Western Cape Concludes Repatriation Efforts Amid Ongoing Stranding of Foreign Nationals
item.description: The Western Cape government has officially concluded its voluntary repatriation operation for foreign nationals, yet media reports indicate that hundreds remain stranded outside the Department of Home...

item.title: NGE Hosts 4th Lateef Jakande Memorial Lecture to Discuss Media and Election Integrity
item.description: The Nigerian Guild of Editors (NGE) is set to host the 4th Lateef Jakande Memorial Lecture on July 23, 2026, at the Sheraton Hotel in Ikeja, Lagos. The event, themed 'The Media, INEC, Voters and Path ...

item.title: Spur workers allege exploitative conditions and denied rights at Cape Town franchise
item.description: Workers at a Spur franchise in Cape Town have accused their employer of systemic labor violations, including poverty wages, excessive working hours, and denial of basic employment rights. Current and ...

item.title: Delhi High Court asks WFI to resolve show-cause notice against Vinesh Phogat within two weeks
item.description: The Delhi High Court has directed the Wrestling Federation of India (WFI) to resolve the show-cause notice issued to wrestler Vinesh Phogat within two weeks. The notice was issued over allegations of ...

item.title: Saskatoon River Safety: Buoys Dislodged, Two Water Rescues Conducted
item.description: The South Saskatchewan River in Saskatoon experienced increased water flow due to higher-than-average levels, which damaged and dislodged safety buoys between the University Bridge and the weir. The c...

item.title: Sigabo Episode 11: Gabo's Efforts to Save Rudy's Life
item.description: The article discusses the 11th episode of the Philippine TV show 'Sigabo,' focusing on the storyline where character Gabo is determined to take all necessary actions to ensure the survival of Rudy. Pu...

item.title: Tragedy During Florida Teen Takeover: 19-Year-Old Killed in July 4 Shooting
item.description: A 19-year-old man was fatally shot, and six others were injured in a violent incident that occurred on July 4 during a chaotic gathering of teenagers in Pensacola, Florida. The shooting took place ami...

item.title: Website blocks bot traffic with error message
item.description: The article explains that News Corp Australia has implemented software to manage crawler bot traffic on its websites. Users who are not bots but encounter a blockage are advised to temporarily disable...

item.title: Delta Billionaire Gifts Kogi Barber ₦5 Million for Kindness
item.description: A Kogi State barber received a life-changing ₦5 million gift from Delta businessman Daniel Omoyibo after a simple act of kindness during a haircut. The story began when Omoyibo, an oil magnate and phi...

item.title: Tanzania Promotes Kiswahili as a Global Language
item.description: The Tanzanian government is actively promoting Kiswahili as a global language through initiatives like the Second International Kiswahili Conference in Paris, France. Minister Paul Makonda emphasized ...

item.title: CMID clarifies migrant remittances are not reverse, highlights economic contributions
item.description: The Centre for Migration and Inclusive Development (CMID) in Kerala has refuted Chief Minister V.D. Satheesan's remarks suggesting that remittances sent by migrant workers are 'reverse'. CMID executiv...

item.title: B12 Deficiency Risk for Patients on Omeprazole and Metformin
item.description: A pharmacist warns that individuals taking omeprazole or metformin should monitor for symptoms of vitamin B12 deficiency, which can develop slowly and go unnoticed. Common signs include fatigue, weakn...

item.title: Rubio Threatens to Address Trump Soccer Scandal at NATO Summit
item.description: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio has escalated tensions over President Donald Trump's alleged interference in a soccer player's suspension case by threatening to bring the issue up at an upcoming N...

item.title: Lainey Wilson Reflects on Her Country Music Journey and Inspirations
item.description: Lainey Wilson, a rising country music star, discusses her career journey, inspirations, and the challenges of success in the industry. The article highlights her early life in a small Louisiana town, ...

item.title: Home Affairs Minister Assures Tanzanians of Safety Ahead of July 7 Protests
item.description: Home Affairs Minister Patrobas Katambi has assured Tanzanians that the country remains peaceful and secure, stating there is no security threat despite reports of planned demonstrations on July 7, 202...

item.title: Rivers Monarch Hails Police Move to Remove Illegal Checkpoints, Boosts Economy
item.description: The Eze Oha Evo III of Evo Kingdom, King Leslie N. Eke, praised Rivers State Commissioner of Police CP Olugbenga Adepoju for eliminating illegal checkpoints and roadblocks, which improved traffic flow...
